item.title: Framing Almost Complete: Farm or Lake House?
item.description: See the near-complete framing of our new build and decide—will it be a cozy farmhouse or a serene lake house? Explore the structure and design choices.

media:content.media:title: Framing Almost Complete: Farm or Lake House?
media:content.media:description: See the near-complete framing of our new build and decide—will it be a cozy farmhouse or a serene lake house? Explore the structure and design choices.

item.title: If Not One Problem, Then 18 More
item.description: A look at tackling multiple issues at once, showing the challenges, problem-solving, and persistence needed when things don’t go as planned.

media:content.media:title: If Not One Problem, Then 18 More
media:content.media:description: A look at tackling multiple issues at once, showing the challenges, problem-solving, and persistence needed when things don’t go as planned.

item.title: Grandpa’s Truck Broke: Dougo’s Fault?
item.description: Grandpa’s truck won’t start, and he blames Dougo! Watch the investigation and reactions as we figure out what really caused the breakdown.

media:content.media:title: Grandpa’s Truck Broke: Dougo’s Fault?
media:content.media:description: Grandpa’s truck won’t start, and he blames Dougo! Watch the investigation and reactions as we figure out what really caused the breakdown.

item.title: Planting Date Is Crucial
item.description: Learn why the planting date is so important, and how timing affects crop growth, yield, and overall farm productivity.

media:content.media:title: Planting Date Is Crucial
media:content.media:description: Learn why the planting date is so important, and how timing affects crop growth, yield, and overall farm productivity.

item.title: We Bought a Tractor We Said Never
item.description: See why we purchased a tractor we never expected to own, exploring its features, challenges, and how it fits into our farm operations.

media:content.media:title: We Bought a Tractor We Said Never
media:content.media:description: See why we purchased a tractor we never expected to own, exploring its features, challenges, and how it fits into our farm operations.

item.title: Mad Dougo Moment
item.description: Catch the moment Dougo shows his frustration, capturing reactions, humor, and the story behind why he’s mad.

media:content.media:title: Mad Dougo Moment
media:content.media:description: Catch the moment Dougo shows his frustration, capturing reactions, humor, and the story behind why he’s mad.

item.title: Planter Upgrades: Time for the Torch
item.description: Watch as we upgrade the planter using welding and modifications, improving performance and efficiency for planting season.

media:content.media:title: Planter Upgrades: Time for the Torch
media:content.media:description: Watch as we upgrade the planter using welding and modifications, improving performance and efficiency for planting season.

item.title: We Had a Farm Accident
item.description: A look at a farm accident, detailing what happened, how it was handled, and safety lessons learned to prevent future incidents.

media:content.media:title: We Had a Farm Accident
media:content.media:description: A look at a farm accident, detailing what happened, how it was handled, and safety lessons learned to prevent future incidents.
